content: Standard pattern (Gaffer On Games 'Fix Your Timestep', pygame wiki ConstantGameSpeed): decouple physics/sim update (fixed dt, e.g. 1-4Hz for this project) from render loop (variable/60fps) via an accumulator - deposit real elapsed time each frame, drain fixed-size sim steps while enough time has accumulated, render every frame (optionally interpolating between last two sim states for smoothness).
